task_completion.description: Open the T8_housing_bracket.FCStd file in FreeCAD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeCAD is open and the active document in the Tree View or window title is 'T8_housing_bracket'.
The FEM workbench is active and an 'Analysis' container (Fem::FemAnalysis) is visible in the Tree View.
A material object (e.g., SolidMaterial) is visible inside the Analysis container in the Tree View, and a dialog or label indicates 'Steel-Generic' is selected.

task_completion.description: Apply a fixed constraint to the flat bottom face on the XY plane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Fixed constraint' (Fem::ConstraintFixed) is visible inside the Analysis container in the Tree View. In the 3D view, constraint markers (usually red lock/pin icons) should be visible on the flat bottom face of the bracket.
A 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'T8_bracket_fem.FCStd' in the correct directory, or the FreeCAD window title / Tree View root node updates to 'T8_bracket_fem'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with FreeCAD menus, toolbars, and dialogs, rather than just terminal commands or Python console scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual 3D model.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport displays the T8 housing bracket model, and selections (like the bottom face) are visible in the 3D view.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by editing the FCStd file directly via text/hex editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors or archive managers are used to manually manipulate the Document.xml inside the FCStd zip structure.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is a real FreeCAD mechanical design (T8_housing_bracket.FCStd). The task requires using the FEM Workbench. The VLM should look for an 'Analysis' container in the Tree View, which corresponds to the required Fem::FemAnalysis object. Inside this container, there must be a material object explicitly set to 'Steel-Generic' and a 'Fixed constraint' (Fem::ConstraintFixed) applied to the bottom face. The final file must be saved as 'T8_bracket_fem.FCStd'.
